## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (80%+ coverage on new code)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, keys, or credentials
- [ ] All user inputs validated at system boundaries
- [ ] Error handling with context (no silent failures)
- [ ] Checked casts for financial values (no `as i64`/`as u64`)
- [ ] Immutable patterns used (no mutation of existing data)
- [ ] Files < 800 lines, functions < 50 lines
- [ ] `cargo test` / `npm run build` passes locally
